# ScoreLead

> AI lead generation software for discovering, scoring, enriching, and contacting qualified B2B company leads.

Site: https://scorelead.io
Contact: hello@scorelead.io
Languages: English, Portuguese, Spanish

## Product

ScoreLead helps B2B companies, sales teams, agencies, and growth operators turn target markets into qualified account pipeline.

Core workflow:

- Discover companies by region, industry, keyword, or target account profile.
- Enrich company leads from websites, maps, and public web sources.
- Score prospects across reach, trust, fit, engagement, and readiness.
- Generate personalized multi-step outreach in multiple languages.
- Track leads from discovery through conversion.
- Export CRM-ready lead data.

- ICP worksheet: https://scorelead.io/tools/icp-worksheet
- Lead scoring calculator: https://scorelead.io/tools/lead-scoring-calculator

- Lead research ROI calculator: https://scorelead.io/tools/lead-research-roi-calculator

All pages above are also available under /pt and /es. The English route is the
source edition; Portuguese and Spanish pages contain complete localized copy,
metadata, canonicals, and reciprocal hreflang links.

- automated outreach software
- B2B account discovery

## Content and Evidence Policy

- Educational content identifies its publishing organization and review date.
- Technical, legal, and platform claims favor primary sources.
- Customer outcomes are presented with a methodology note and are not guarantees.
- AI may assist drafting or translation; ScoreLead remains responsible for published accuracy.
- Corrections can be sent to hello@scorelead.io.
